title: DEKTON Hose Reel Cart with 20M Hose & Nozzle Kit | Heavy-Duty Watering Solution | Portable & Easy Wind-Up Design | Ideal for Gardens, Lawns, and Outdoor Cleaning Tasks
features: High-Quality 20M Hose: Equipped with a durable 20-meter hose, this Dekton reel cart provides ample reach for watering large gardens, lawns, and outdoor spaces. Built to resist kinks and maintain smooth water flow.

Convenient Nozzle Kit Included: Comes with a versatile nozzle kit, offering adjustable spray patterns for various tasks, from gentle misting to powerful jets. Perfect for delicate plants, outdoor cleaning, and more.

Heavy-Duty Reel Cart Design: Constructed from robust materials, the hose reel cart is designed for long-lasting durability and easy maneuverability. The sturdy frame ensures stability during use and smooth portability.

Effortless Wind-Up Mechanism: The ergonomic wind-up handle allows for fast and hassle-free hose storage. Easily retract the 20-meter hose onto the reel without tangling, keeping your garden organized.

Versatile & Practical: Ideal for a wide range of gardening and outdoor cleaning activities. This hose reel cart with nozzle kit offers flexibility for everyday tasks, making watering, cleaning, and maintenance easier.
description: The Dekton High-Quality Hose Reel Cart with 20M Hose and Nozzle Kit is a premium solution for all your outdoor watering and cleaning needs. Featuring a durable 20-meter hose, this reel cart allows you to easily reach every corner of your garden or lawn. The hose is made from high-quality materials that resist kinks, ensuring consistent water flow, while the included nozzle kit offers multiple spray options for various tasks, from delicate plant watering to intense surface cleaning. Built with a heavy-duty frame, the reel cart is designed to withstand outdoor conditions and provide long-lasting use. The easy wind-up mechanism with an ergonomic handle ensures hassle-free hose storage, allowing you to keep your space tidy after every use. Whether you're watering plants, washing your car, or maintaining outdoor areas, the Dekton High-Quality Hose Reel Cart with 20M Hose and Nozzle Kit offers a versatile and practical solution for all your gardening and cleaning tasks. Durable, portable, and user-friendly, it simplifies your outdoor routine.
